_meta.description: Map a source Jira issue to a stable Xray Test Execution so repeated workflow runs reuse one execution ticket instead of creating a new Jira item every time.

GUNSQA-32.note: Reuse the existing execution linked to the G32 runner workflow.

GUNSQA-51.note: Run UT-U-01 from the Test issue branch and reuse the stable unit-test execution.
